raw_consumer_statement: Since XXXX of this year there has been multiple charges on my card coming from the HomeDepot in XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX several times in one day there were 3 back to back charges from this same store in XXXX, XXXX and today XX/XX/XXXX totalling over inat least {$2500.00} in charges buying some type of XXXX clock every time where I only get building materials they keep sending me cards and some how they're using the card before I received it in the mail I haven't used or shopped at the store since the first report every time I call they claim there's a block on the account and I shouldn't have to worry about it plus they gave me a password to use incase if I did come in I would have to call the issuer with the password to ok my purchase well evidently that didn't work so today XX/XX/XXXX I received a message from citi bank issuer of the card that there was 2 purchases made on my card one for {$360.00} and the other for {$540.00} so I called the fraud department again they claimed they closed the account and will send out another but why when whoever this is will get it and go buy more of this XXXX stuff that's all they get so today I decided to go to XXXX XXXX HomeDepot and try to talk to management but girls at service desk said he wasn't in and wanted to know my problem I told her she ask for my last 4 of social to look up my purchases and claim she didn't see anything on my account I ask her what are these XXXX clocks and she pointed them out infront of the service desk in the store I thought these things had security buttons on them and have to be scanned at the register and HomeDepot fraud department told me they where being purchased at a register I wish they will investigate so this will stop it's been going on to long I have multiple citibank cards and this is the only one I'm having problems with and im scared to use it right now until this is resolved.
